title: Hats for All!
description: Adds hats to Minecraft! Obtainable in survival, multiplayer friendly.
body:
🎩 Hats for All!
-
🢂 Adds 16 hats (with more to come!) to collect and wear in your world

🢂 Obtainable in survival, multiplayer friendly!

🢂 Vanilla style

HOW TO USE: To find hats, open any chest in any vanilla structure for the first time (except villages), and you have a 5% chance to get a random hat. Right click while holding the hat to equip it, if you have an empty head slot.

In addition to hats, you might also receive hat augments. These can be applied to hats to give them as much defense as real helmets, so they're a little but more useful!

💡 Info & Help
-

🢂 Ask for help and report bugs in my [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/EC5j5Z9bFW)
